title: cyclosorus peripae
intro: Cyclosorus peripae, also known as the Chinese cyclosorus fern or ladder brake fern, is a species of fern in the genus Cyclosorus, which is native to Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cyclosorus peripae include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or decoction, and it can also be used in herbal infusions and tinctures.
